title: Settings Page
content:
## Settings Page

This component renders the main settings page for the application. Currently, it displays a placeholder indicating that settings functionality is under development.

### Purpose

- Provides a dedicated page for users to manage their account and application preferences.
- Serves as a placeholder for future settings features.

### Key Components/Elements

- **Page Title:** "Settings"
- **Page Description:** "Manage your account and preferences."
- **Placeholder Text:** "Settings coming soon."

### Usage

This component is intended to be rendered as a top-level page within the `/dashboard/settings` route of the application. It is a functional component that returns JSX to define the page's structure and content.
